archetypeDefinitions.LEAD_GUARD: Expected 24+ minutes, not a center, guard position or assist-heavy profile.
archetypeDefinitions.HELIOCENTRIC_GUARD: Expected 32+ minutes, star-level scoring and assists, primary ball-dominant guard creator.
archetypeDefinitions.WING: Expected 24+ minutes, not a center, not classified as lead guard.
archetypeDefinitions.POINT_FORWARD: Expected 24+ minutes, forward-sized creator with star-level points/rebounds/assists and low 3PM volume.
archetypeDefinitions.LOW_MINUTE_BENCH: Expected under 24 minutes or low starter rate.
